description: Install dependencies and verify the project builds successfully before making changes.
steps: Run pnpm install in /projects/sandbox/expense-tracker-fe to install all dependencies
Run pnpm build to verify the project builds without errors
Run pnpm lint to verify biome linting passes
acceptance_criteria: pnpm lint passes or shows only pre-existing warnings
verification: pnpm lint exits with code 0 (or only pre-existing issues)
findings: All steps passed. pnpm install added 525 packages. Build succeeded (Next.js 16.1.4 with Turbopack). Lint passed with 2 pre-existing warnings (unused suppression in categories-table.tsx and noDocumentCookie in sidebar.tsx). The BetterAuthError about BETTER_AUTH_SECRET is a non-blocking warning during static page generation.
